title: sed
html:
sed

File Read

sed '' /path/to/input-file

File Write

sed -n '1s/.*/DATA/w /path/to/output-file' /etc/hosts

Shell

sed -n '1e exec /bin/sh 1>&0' /etc/hosts
sed e
excerpt: sed File Read sed '' /path/to/input-file File Write sed -n '1s/.*/DATA/w /path/to/output-file' /etc/hosts Shell sed -n '1e exec /bin/sh 1>&0' /etc/hosts sed e
